body_txt: Not all grandparents are the doting, cookie-baking, gift-giving type . Some of them are strict, serious, and unyielding—more likely to issue rules than treats. These grandparents expect discipline, hard work, and good manners from their descendants, and they won’t hesitate to enforce their standards. If you talk back, you might get the dreaded grandparent glare, a stern lecture, or even an old-school punishment that makes modern parenting seem downright lenient. Expect to hear a lot of When I Was Your Age... with them. Often, this trope is used to contrast with Doting Grandparent , who believes their grandchildren can do no wrong. The Stern Grandparent, on the other hand, is the one who enforces the rules, insists on proper etiquette, and makes sure the younger generation knows the value of hard work. They may have a military background, come from a strict cultural tradition, or simply believe that discipline builds character. This trope can be played seriously, with a grandparent trying to pass down tough but necessary lessons, or for laughs , with an old-timer whose strictness is hilariously out of touch with modern parenting. Sometimes, they’re revealed to be softer than they appear, offering rare but meaningful words of praise when they’re truly earned. And if they ever do give a gift or show affection? You know it means something. Truth in Television : Many cultures place a strong emphasis on respect for elders, and some grandparents uphold this by maintaining discipline in their family. Historically, older generations often had stricter upbringings and expected the same of their descendants. That being said, No Real Life Examples, Please! , as this is too common that listing them would be pointless. Sub-Trope of Tough Love . The grandparental equivalent of strict parents (related tropes: Strict Parents Make Sneaky Kids , Stern Parent, Doting Parent ). Contrast Doting Grandparent , this trope’s polar opposite, and Grandparental Obliviousness , when they’re too oblivious to be strict. If the strictness is intense enough to the point of them being abusive, that’s Gruesome Grandparent . Can overlap with Raised by Grandparents , and often does, as grandparents put in a position to raise their grandchildren have to take on a parental role, thus meaning they can't be spoiling. See also Grumpy Old Man which can overlap with this.
